Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Huiyuechi Electronic Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Huiyuechi Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is an extremely typical absurd specimen of a 'single-person computer/printer repair shop in a downtown office building' violently elevated by the system into a major electronics manufacturing factory. The official commercial system, merely because its name contains 'Electronic Technology' and the license begins with an extremely broad phrase 'R&D of electronic products,' directly stamped it with the heavy-asset seal of 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe and common-sense engine directly pierce this disguise: this is a micro-enterprise solely owned by a natural person with a paid-in capital of only 500,000 RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is a pitiful '1 person'! The core demotion strike comes from its registered coordinates: 'Room 906, No. 1 Fuhougang, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' Fuhougang is located in the core area of the extremely prosperous Gulou/Xuanwu Lake business district in downtown Nanjing (adjacent to the provincial government). On the 9th floor (Room 906) of an office building in the prime downtown area where land is at a premium, relying on a single boss to establish an industrial production line for computers and electronic devices? This completely breaks through physical and economic common sense. Carefully reviewing its actual business license: 'sales of computer software and hardware, printer equipment and consumables; repair of computer software and hardware, and printer equipment.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not a major electronics manufacturing plant; it is a One-Person Office Equipment Retail & Repair Shop hidden in a downtown office building. The owner (Liu Fangfang) makes a living by selling toner cartridges and ink cartridges, and by repairing computers and printers for businesses in surrounding office buildings.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 73)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ONE-PERSON IT & PRINTER REPAIR SHOP
